senses.definition: to eat greedily and in large quantities

examples.x: After fasting all day, she decided to gorge on a hearty meal at the buffet, savoring each dish.
The aroma of freshly baked pastries in the bakery caused customers to stop and gorge on sweet treats.
As the barbecue smoke wafted through the air, friends eagerly gathered to gorge on grilled burgers and ribs.
In the aftermath of the successful harvest, the community came together to gorge on a bountiful harvest feast.
At the all-you-can-eat seafood buffet, diners gorged on a variety of ocean delights.

senses.definition: to eat snacks or light meals

examples.x: While waiting for the train, travelers would nosh on grab-and-go sandwiches and salads from the station cafe.
The evening gathering included a spread of tapas for guests to nosh on while socializing.

senses.definition: to eat with enthusiasm and hearty appetite

examples.x: With the Thanksgiving feast spread out before them, everyone eagerly grabbed their forks, ready to tuck in and enjoy the abundance of delicious dishes.
The buffet at the party was filled with tempting dishes, and guests wasted no time in grabbing plates to tuck in and savor the delectable spread.
As the aroma of freshly baked cookies wafted through the kitchen, the kids couldn't resist the temptation to tuck in and enjoy the sweet treats.
The family gathered around the dinner table, eager to tuck in to the delicious homemade lasagna that filled the air with its savory aroma.
After a long day of hiking, the hungry campers couldn't wait to tuck in a hearty meal of roasted marshmallows and hot dogs around the campfire.

senses.definition: to consume or absorb liquids, especially beverages

examples.x: During the celebration, guests were eager to imbibe the sparkling champagne in toast of the special occasion.
The tropical resort offered a diverse menu of fruity cocktails for guests to imbibe by the pool.
As part of the wine tour, participants had the opportunity to imbibe a variety of exquisite vintages.
Last night, the revelers imbibed a selection of fine wines and spirits at the upscale event.
After a successful business deal, the partners imbibed rare scotch whiskies to celebrate their achievement.

senses.definition: to crush or grind something loudly and noisily with the teeth

examples.x: He crunched the potato chips loudly during the movie.
She crunched the hard candy in her mouth, savoring the flavor.
The dog crunched the biscuit eagerly.
She crunched the popcorn while watching the show.

senses.definition: to eat something quickly and voraciously

examples.x: The ravenous predator decided to wolf the prey it had caught, devouring it with precision.
The competitive eater managed to wolf a staggering number of hot dogs in record time during the contest.
When the buffet opened, hungry attendees began to wolf the delicious spread of international cuisines.
The enthusiastic foodie couldn't help but wolf the gourmet burger with delight at the trendy restaurant.
The camping trip brought out the adventurer's appetite as they set up the campfire to wolf a simple yet satisfying meal.

senses.definition: to drink something in one large gulp or swallow

examples.x: The exhausted hiker paused to swig from the canteen, quenching his thirst on the trail.
After a long day in the sun, the beachgoer swigged a cold soda to cool down.
The celebratory toast prompted everyone to swig champagne in joyous unison.
The traveler, parched from the journey, swigged from a bottle of water upon reaching the destination.
When the friends shared a laugh at the picnic, they raised their cans to swig some iced tea.

senses.definition: to consume a liquid or soft substance with enthusiasm, often using the tongue, as in the manner of an animal drinking or eating

examples.x: The kitten eagerly lapped up the bowl of milk, enjoying every drop with enthusiasm.
As the ice cream melted in the summer heat, children happily lapped up the sweet treat.
The dog joyfully lapped up the gravy from its food bowl, wagging its tail in contentment.
The elderly cat, with a gentle purr, slowly lapped up water from its dish.
The chef encouraged diners to use naan bread to lap up the flavorful curry sauce on their plates.

senses.definition: to consume a beverage, usually a carbonated or alcoholic one, quickly and in large gulps

examples.x: Thirsty after the game, he decided to chug a cold bottle of water.
The college students gathered to chug sodas during the hot summer afternoon.
She challenged her friends to see who could chug a can of soda the fastest.
At the party, they played a game where participants had to chug a mug of beer without stopping.
The group of friends loudly cheered as they chugged their beers in a drinking contest.

senses.definition: to chew or bite down on something with a strong, audible, and repeated motion

examples.x: The hungry toddler couldn't wait to chomp the crunchy apple, revealing a toothy grin with each bite.
As the popcorn movie night began, everyone in the room started to chomp their buttery popcorn.
The enthusiastic eater couldn't resist the temptation to chomp the juicy watermelon slices at the summer picnic.
When the crunchy chips were brought out at the party, guests began to chomp them while engaging in conversation.

senses.definition: to drink a large quantity of a liquid in a hearty, enthusiastic manner

examples.x: As the toast was raised, everyone cheered and began to quaff their glasses in celebration.
In the cozy cafe, customers quaffed steaming mugs of coffee, enjoying the aromatic and comforting beverage.
The tradition continued as the community quaffed traditional beverages during the annual harvest celebration.

senses.definition: to consume a drink or liquid food

examples.x: She sat by the fireplace, quietly supping on a cup of hot tea to warm herself on the chilly evening.
The elderly gentleman preferred to sup his soup slowly, savoring each spoonful for its comforting warmth.
The child happily supped on a glass of milk while listening to bedtime stories.
As the sun sets, the friends gather around the campfire to sup on mugs of hot cocoa.
The artist takes breaks from painting to sup on a refreshing fruit smoothie.

senses.definition: to drink something, especially an alcoholic beverage, enthusiastically, and in large quantities

examples.x: Thirsty after the game, he proceeded to guzzle a whole bottle of water.
The friends decided to guzzle sodas while watching the movie marathon.
At the celebration, they began to guzzle champagne in high spirits.
After the long hike, they sat around the campfire and guzzled hot cocoa.
The crowd started to guzzle cold beer as they enjoyed the live music.

senses.definition: to quickly and often carelessly consume large amounts of liquid, particularly alcoholic drinks

examples.x: After the victory, they decided to swill celebratory champagne.
The sailors would gather at the tavern to swill rum after a long day at sea.
He continued to swill beer throughout the evening, unaware of his alcohol intake.
The festival attendees swilled mugs of ale as they enjoyed the live music.
In celebration, they swilled a concoction of tropical fruit juices at the beach.

senses.definition: a cooking technique that involves slow cooking meat in fat at a low temperature, resulting in tender and flavorful meat

examples.x: The chef prepared duck confit by cooking the duck legs slowly in duck fat until they were tender and succulent.
Traditional French cuisine often features dishes like confit de canard, showcasing the rich flavors achieved through this cooking method.
She made a batch of pork confit by slowly cooking pork belly in its own fat until it melted in the mouth.
The restaurant's signature dish is rabbit confit, served with roasted vegetables and a tangy sauce.
The chef demonstrated how to make confit of salmon, a modern twist on the traditional method using fish instead of poultry.

senses.definition: a cooking method that involves exposing food to heat, often over a fire or under a grill

examples.x: The chef used the broiling method to quickly cook the steak, resulting in a deliciously seared exterior.
Broiling is an ideal method for preparing kebabs, giving the meat a smoky flavor and charred edges.
The broiling process caramelized the sugar topping on the crème brûlée, creating a crisp and sweet crust.

senses.definition: a combination of either pickles, vegetables, spices, and herbs, that is used as condiment

examples.x: I created a unique avocado chutney, blending the creamy fruit with lime juice, cilantro, and jalapenos.
When I tasted the tomato chutney, I was pleasantly surprised by the robust flavors.
The mango chutney served with the curry added a tangy sweetness to the dish.
The mint chutney provided a refreshing contrast to the spicy samosas.
The tamarind chutney had a perfect balance of sweet and sour flavors, complementing the savory pakoras.

senses.definition: an occasion when a person drinks or eats excessively

examples.x: Binge eating can be a symptom of underlying emotional distress or mental health issues.
He struggled with alcohol addiction and often went on binges that lasted for days.
The culture of binge drinking among college students is a growing concern for health authorities.
She sought help from a therapist to address her binge eating disorder and regain control over her eating habits.

senses.definition: a junior chef learning and assisting in the kitchen under experienced chefs

examples.x: As a commis in the restaurant, he started his culinary career by learning basic kitchen techniques and assisting the chefs.
She was promoted from commis to line cook after demonstrating skill and dedication in the kitchen.
The commis worked tirelessly to keep the kitchen organized and stocked with fresh ingredients.
Being a commis in a Michelin-starred restaurant was a valuable learning experience for him, shaping his future as a chef.

senses.definition: a dish of small amount eaten before the main part of a meal, originated in Italy

examples.x: The restaurant served a delightful antipasto platter, featuring an array of cured meats, cheeses, and marinated vegetables.
The chef showcased his creativity by crafting an innovative antipasto board, incorporating exotic ingredients and artisanal cheeses.
Before the main course arrived, the waiter presented a tempting antipasto selection, enticing diners with its variety of flavors and textures.

senses.definition: food that contains little or no artificial substance and is considered healthy
a type of diet in which one avoids eating processed food to become healthier

examples.x: Clean eating involves consuming whole, minimally processed foods and avoiding refined sugars and artificial additives.
She adopted a clean eating approach, prioritizing fresh fruits, vegetables, and lean proteins in her daily meals.
Clean eating promotes a balanced diet that supports overall health and well-being, emphasizing nutrient-dense foods over empty calories.
Following a clean eating regimen, he felt more energized and experienced improvements in his digestion and sleep patterns.
The clean eating movement has gained popularity as people become more conscious of the connection between diet and health outcomes.

senses.definition: a storage room for alcoholic beverages, primarily wine and ale, and sometimes provisions, including food

examples.x: The medieval castle featured a dimly lit buttery where casks of wine and ale were stored.
The innkeeper unlocked the buttery to retrieve a bottle of fine wine for the guests.
Monasteries often had a buttery for the storage and distribution of ale among the monks.
As part of the renovation, the homeowners converted the cellar into a modern buttery for both wine and gourmet provisions.
Exploring the historic estate, visitors marveled at the well-preserved buttery where provisions and wines were once stored.

senses.definition: tasting or smelling very good

examples.x: The chocolate truffles were absolutely delectable, melting in my mouth.
My grandmother's homemade cookies were always a delectable treat whenever I visited her.
The delectable aroma of freshly baked bread filled the kitchen.
She prepared a delectable seafood pasta dish that left everyone wanting more.
His homemade pizza was a delectable combination of savory toppings and gooey cheese.

senses.definition: relating to enjoyment of luxuries, especially through delicious food and drink

examples.x: She prepared an epicurean feast fit for kings, with delicate foods and fine wines.
They prepared an epicurean feast of crab cakes, filet mignon, and chocolate soufflé for their guests.
The resort offered epicurean dining options with gourmet meals made from locally-sourced ingredients.

senses.definition: having to do with the preparation, cooking, or presentation of food

examples.x: She enrolled in a culinary school to learn professional cooking techniques.
He had a vast collection of culinary herbs and spices in his kitchen.
They attended a culinary festival showcasing dishes from around the world.
He admired the culinary skills of the chef as they watched a cooking show on television.
She wrote a culinary blog sharing recipes and cooking tips with her followers.

senses.definition: extremely tasty and satisfying to eat

examples.x: She prepared a scrumptious dinner with roasted vegetables and tender grilled chicken.
The bakery displayed an array of scrumptious pastries, tempting customers with their sweet delights.
The picnic included a scrumptious assortment of sandwiches, salads, and fruit.
He took a bite of the scrumptious burger and savored the juicy flavors.

senses.definition: an amount of money charged by a restaurant for drinking a wine that was bought from somewhere else by the customer

examples.x: The restaurant allows you to bring your own wine, but they charge a corkage fee of $15 per bottle.
We decided to bring a special vintage to the wedding reception, knowing the corkage fee was worth it.
The hotel's policy on corkage was clearly stated: no outside alcohol allowed without a prior arrangement and an additional fee.
To avoid the high corkage charges, we opted to enjoy our champagne in the hotel room instead of the dining hall.
